title: Sisense Dashboard Structure
description: Documentation of the dashboard data structure returned by the Sisense REST API

fields.name: oid
fields.description: MongoDB ObjectId serving as the unique dashboard identifier

fields.name: title
fields.description: Dashboard display title shown to users

fields.name: owner
fields.description: User ID of the dashboard creator and primary owner

fields.name: folder
fields.description: Parent folder ID for organizing dashboards in the portal

fields.name: shares
fields.description: Access control list of user and group share permissions

fields.name: shares[].shareId
fields.description: User or group ID being granted access

fields.name: shares[].type
fields.description: Type of entity being granted access

fields.name: shares[].rule
fields.description: Permission level: view (read-only) or edit (full access)

fields.name: lastUpdated
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification
